quests.description: Visit the demonstration rooms to earn your developer badge.

quests.description: Follow the trail to the cabin.

stages.text: Follow the trail and reach the cabin door.
stages.title: Find the Cabin

quests.start_toast: Prologue: Follow the path to the cabin.
quests.title: Prologue: Find the Cabin

quests.description: Search the cabin and light the hearth.

stages.text: Inside the cabin, reach the hearth to finish the prologue.
stages.title: Light the Hearth

quests.start_toast: Prologue: Inside the cabin, light the hearth.
quests.title: Prologue: Light the Hearth

quests.description: Head back outside and return to the trailhead.

stages.text: Leave the cabin and return to the trailhead to finish the prologue.
stages.title: Return to Trailhead

quests.title: Prologue: Return to Trailhead

quests.complete_toast: Prologue: Note found in the cabin.
quests.description: Find a small note tucked away inside the cabin.

stages.text: Explore the cabin and look for a tucked-away note.
stages.title: Find the Note

quests.start_toast: Prologue: Search the cabin for a note.
quests.title: Prologue: Optional Note

quests.description: Choose and clear the upper route beyond the trailhead.

stages.text: Step onto the upper path and push through to the end.

quests.description: Choose and clear the lower route beyond the trailhead.

stages.text: Step onto the lower path and push through to the end.

quests.description: Both routes converge ahead. Press on to the crossroads.

stages.text: Head deeper along the converging trail to the crossroads.

quests.start_toast: Act 1: Routes converge - reach the crossroads.
quests.title: Act 1: Convergence

quests.description: Both routes converge ahead. Press on to the crossroads.

stages.text: Head deeper along the converging trail to the crossroads.

quests.start_toast: Act 1: Routes converge - reach the crossroads.

quests.description: Acknowledge the chosen route at the convergence point.

quests.description: Acknowledge the chosen route at the convergence point.

stages.text: Lower route confirmed.

stages.text: With the gate unlocked, reach the far side of the path.

quests.start_toast: Act 1: Follow the path into the clearing.

quests.description: Take the upper trail and secure the route.

stages.text: Follow the upper trail through the clearing.

quests.title: Act 1: Upper Trail

quests.description: Take the lower trail and secure the route.

stages.text: Follow the lower trail through the clearing.

stages.text: Reach the exit point beyond the clearing.

stages.text: Reach the exit point beyond the clearing.

quests.description: Solve the rune sequence to unlock the exit.

stages.text: Enter the puzzle chamber.
stages.title: Enter the Puzzle Room

stages.text: Inspect the plaque for a hint.
stages.title: Read the Hint

stages.text: Step on the runes in the correct order.
stages.title: Solve the Rune Sequence

quests.title: Puzzle Room

quests.description: Solve the timed rune sequence under pressure.

stages.text: Enter the second puzzle chamber.
stages.title: Enter Puzzle Room 02

stages.text: Inspect the plaque for a hint (optional).
stages.title: Read the Hint

stages.text: Solve the rune sequence before time runs out.
stages.title: Solve the Timed Rune Sequence

quests.title: Puzzle Room 02

quests.description: Solve the lever and rune puzzle within a short window.

stages.text: Enter the third puzzle chamber.
stages.title: Enter Puzzle Room 03

stages.text: Pull the left lever first.
stages.title: Pull the Left Lever

stages.text: Pull the right lever, then step on the rune before time runs out.
stages.title: Complete the Lever Sequence

quests.title: Puzzle Room 03

stages.text: Locate the ancient artifact.
stages.title: Find the Artifact

stages.text: Defeat the boss enemy.
stages.title: Defeat the Boss

quests.description: Enter the arena, defeat the sentry, claim the reward.

stages.text: Step into the combat arena.
stages.title: Enter the Arena

stages.text: Destroy the sentry archer.
stages.title: Defeat the Sentry

stages.text: Open the reward chest.
stages.title: Claim Reward

quests.title: Combat Vignette

quests.description: Meet the vendor in the morning, then find the secret at night.

stages.text: Arrive at the town.
stages.title: Enter Town

stages.text: Interact with the vendor during morning hours.
stages.title: Meet the Vendor

stages.text: Discover the secret behind the night gate.
stages.title: Find the Secret

quests.title: Town Schedule

quests.description: Meet the mentor, choose your approach, and escape the archive.

stages.text: Speak with the mentor and choose how to proceed.
stages.title: Choose Your Approach

stages.text: Inspect the archive journal to recover the exit clue.
stages.title: Find the Archive Clue

stages.text: Use the unlocked door and finish the briefing.
stages.title: Reach the Exit

quests.title: Episode 01: Mentor's Gate

quests.description: Complete the town, puzzle room, and combat vignette in sequence.

stages.text: Meet the vendor and find the secret.
stages.title: Complete the Town

stages.text: Solve the lever-and-rune puzzle.
stages.title: Complete the Puzzle

stages.text: Defeat the sentry and claim the reward.
stages.title: Complete the Combat

quests.title: Mini Campaign

quests.description: Trace the signal pattern, then either stabilize the relay chain or shut it down.

stages.text: Enter the chamber and wait for the briefing to finish.
stages.title: Witness the Signal

stages.text: Choose stabilize or shutdown, then complete that objective path.
stages.title: Resolve the Pattern

stages.text: Use the unlocked exit and finish the episode.
stages.title: Leave the Chamber

quests.title: Episode 02: Signal in the Dust

quests.description: Solve the sigil order puzzle, unlock the gate, and leave the chamber.

stages.text: Watch the briefing and prepare for the sigil sequence.
stages.title: Enter the Chamber

stages.text: Activate sigils A, B, then C to unlock the exit.
stages.title: Solve the Sigil Sequence

stages.text: Use the unlocked gate to complete the episode.
stages.title: Leave Through the Gate

quests.title: Episode 03: The Three Sigils

quests.description: Complete Episode 01, Episode 02, and Episode 03 in sequence.

stages.text: Enter Episode 01 and finish the archive briefing.
stages.title: Complete Episode 01

stages.text: Resolve the signal chamber and continue onward.
stages.title: Complete Episode 02

stages.text: Solve the sigil chamber and finish the campaign.
stages.title: Complete Episode 03

quests.title: Mini Campaign 02: Episodes 01-03 Chain

quests.description: Choose your risk level, clear the sentry encounter, and secure the causeway reward.

stages.text: Enter the arena and complete the opening briefing.
stages.title: Hold the Line

stages.text: Take the safe route (one sentry) or the challenge route (two sentries).
stages.title: Clear the Sentries

stages.text: Collect the reward to trigger extraction and finish the episode.
stages.title: Claim the Cache

quests.title: Episode 04: Sentry at the Causeway

quests.description: Complete Episode 01 through Episode 04 in sequence, with mentor-help payoff persisting into Episode 04.

stages.text: Finish Episode 01 and carry your mentor choice forward.
stages.title: Complete Episode 01

stages.text: Resolve Episode 02 and continue the signal trail.
stages.title: Complete Episode 02

stages.text: Solve Episode 03 and move to the causeway.
stages.title: Complete Episode 03

stages.text: Clear Episode 04 and resolve the mentor payoff ending.
stages.title: Complete Episode 04

quests.title: Mini Campaign 03: Episodes 01-04 with Choice Payoff

quests.description: Complete Episode 01 through Episode 05 in sequence, with mentor-help and side-objective payoff reflected in Episode 05 reward.

stages.text: Finish Episode 01 and establish the mentor-help branch state.
stages.title: Complete Episode 01

stages.text: Resolve Episode 02 and continue the campaign chain.
stages.title: Complete Episode 02

stages.text: Solve Episode 03 and advance to the causeway.
stages.title: Complete Episode 03

stages.text: Clear Episode 04 and transition to Hollowmere.
stages.title: Complete Episode 04

stages.text: Complete Episode 05 to finish the full five-episode campaign.
stages.title: Complete Episode 05

quests.title: Mini Campaign 04: Episodes 01-05 Dual-Payoff Chain

quests.description: Enter Hollowmere, meet the vendor by day, then meet the mentor at night.

stages.text: Arrive in the market district and receive the briefing.
stages.title: Enter Hollowmere

stages.text: Wait for morning and speak to the vendor while the stall is open.
stages.title: Speak with the Vendor

stages.text: Reach the tavern at night and report to the mentor.
stages.title: Meet the Mentor at Night

quests.title: Episode 05: Hollowmere Market

quests.description: Choose your route, clear the sentry gate, solve the conduit puzzle, and extract.

stages.text: Enter the chamber, complete the intro, and choose fight-through or solve-first.
stages.title: Commit to a Route

stages.text: Defeat the route sentry and solve the conduit rune order to unlock extraction.
stages.title: Clear the Hybrid Gate

stages.text: Collect the route reward and leave through the vault door.
stages.title: Claim and Extract

quests.title: Episode 06: Conduit of Ash

quests.description: Complete Episode 01 through Episode 06 in sequence with deterministic branch handling.

stages.text: Resolve Episode 01 and advance the campaign chain.
stages.title: Complete Episode 01

stages.text: Resolve Episode 02 and advance to the sigil vault.
stages.title: Complete Episode 02

stages.text: Resolve Episode 03 and advance to the causeway.
stages.title: Complete Episode 03

stages.text: Resolve Episode 04 and continue to Hollowmere.
stages.title: Complete Episode 04

stages.text: Resolve Episode 05 and transition to the conduit vault.
stages.title: Complete Episode 05

stages.text: Resolve Episode 06 hybrid gate to finish the six-episode chain.
stages.title: Complete Episode 06

quests.title: Mini Campaign 05: Episodes 01-06 Hybrid Chain
